titleStmt.title: SII 6.1130: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1130. (A.R. No. 356 of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śākābdē ta¨rkaraṁdrāruṇaparigaṇitē śrāvaṇē kṛṣṇapakṣē dha
[¨r*]māhē jīvavārē hariśikharipatēḥ sannidhau dhupakālē . puṇyāptyai cāma
rasya pratidinamadadāddharanāyāpi tōdyē patraśrīdā[¨r*]mmadāsaprabu
varatanayō visvanathō vadanya[ḥ .*] śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1296 gunē
ṁṭi śrāvaṇa kṛṣṇa dasamiyu guruvāramunāṁḍu kaḷiṁgaparīkṣa
pātraśrīda¨rmmadāsajīyyana Adikāramaṁdu vīri koḍukulu paṁḍḍalē
ṁka kaḷiṁgamāji visvanādajīyyana tanaku nabhiṣṭā[¨r*]tthasidiga śrī
narasiṁhanāthuni sannidhini Ubhayadupalanu cāmarapaṭṭanu śrībha
ṁḍaramaṁdu padmanidhigaṁdamāḍalu 10 peṭṭi reṁḍu nibaṁdālū
vṛtigāṁ baḍasi sānulaṁdu narasiṁhamukhari manumaṟālu bā
lasarasvati purasāni saṁpradāyamaṁdu samudrataṁttāsāni
manmāṟālu kuppāsānikinni Ācaṁdrā¨rkastahigaṁ beṭṭenu vī
riddaṟunnu Ī prasadamu nelapaḍi Appalu viḍiyalu Eṁḍa
dijītamu Enimidi sinnālu 8 paṟukalu . [Ī]ṁtavaṭṭunu
bhujiṁci koluvaṁgalāru . Ī dha¨rmuvu śrīvaiṇava rakṣa .
śatruṇapakṛtō dha¨rmma palanīyō mānīṣibhiḥ śatrurava hi śatrusya
dha¨rma satru na kasyacit . śrī śrī śrī . vīri dattamu cāmara O 1 .
Digital edition of SII 6.1130 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
